code_change: scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py now blocks retained performance acceptance when aggregate_vs_c1 or aggregate_vs_serial_bridge <= 1.0, so projection-dispatch evidence cannot promote an invalid accepted artifact.

final_retained_validation.decision_reason: scaling.ratios.aggregate_vs_c1 must be > 1.0 for retained performance claim

notes: Projection-dispatch evidence covers c=2 only and makes runtime metadata select the measured native-batch projection candidate instead of row_gemv_until_caware_benchmark. The profiled retained validation remains blocked, not accepted, because aggregate_vs_c1 is below 1.0; no retained throughput claim is made.
